title: Add packages for Ubuntu 19.10 distributions
body:
/kind feature

**Description**
I'm currently running Pop! Os 19.10, which is based on Ubuntu 19.10 Eoan Ermine, but there is currently no repository for this version, see https://launchpad.net/~projectatomic/+archive/ubuntu/ppa

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

    Go to https://launchpad.net/~projectatomic/+archive/ubuntu/ppa

**Describe the results you received:**
See that there are no packages for 19.10

**Describe the results you expected:**
Packages for Ubuntu 19.10

Side note: As 19.10 officially deprecates 19.04 support (or at least that's what I thought), 19.04 packages can be dropped eventually.

comments.body: This issue had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the issue will be automatically closed within 7 days.
I'm enabling ubuntu 19.10 on OBS along with debian, see: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/1742#issuecomment-555061785
19.10 has been enabled now, see: https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/install.md . Please re-open if any issues..
